name: auth
title: Auth
description: Full authentication system with NextAuth.js v5, multi-provider OAuth, credentials, magic link, and guest access.

files.content:
import { handlers } from "@/server/auth";
export const { GET, POST } = handlers;

docs: Full auth system with NextAuth.js v5. Run `npx auth secret` to generate `AUTH_SECRET`. Configure at least one OAuth provider (e.g. `AUTH_GITHUB_ID` + `AUTH_GITHUB_SECRET`) or enable guest access with `ENABLE_AUTH_GUEST=true`. Requires a database — set `DATABASE_URL` and run Drizzle migrations.
